mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(r.record_time,'%m-%d') AS DATE, CASE WEEKDAY( r.record_time ) WHEN 0 THEN '周一' WHEN 1 THEN '周二' WHEN 2 THEN '周三' WHEN 3 THEN '周四' WHEN 4 THEN '周五' WHEN 5 THEN '周六' WHEN 6 THEN '周日' END AS WEEK, r.id, r.amount, r.record_type, DATE_FORMAT(r.record_time,'%m-%d %h:%m') create_time, CASE WHEN r.remark IS NOT NULL AND r.remark != '' THEN CONCAT( r.category_name, '-', r.remark ) ELSE r.category_name END AS category_name, SUM( CASE WHEN r.record_type = 2 THEN r.amount ELSE 0 END ) OVER ( PARTITION BY r.record_time ) AS total_income, SUM( CASE WHEN r.record_type = 1 THEN r.amount ELSE 0 END ) OVER ( PARTITION BY r.record_time ) AS total_expense, r.category_icon FROM record r WHERE ( -- 用户本人的记录 r.user_id = #{userId} OR -- 家庭组其他成员的记录（如果用户有家庭） r.user_id IN ( SELECT user_id FROM family WHERE group_id = ( SELECT group_id FROM family WHERE user_id = #{userId} ) AND user_id != #{userId} ) ) AND r.record_time LIKE CONCAT( #{time}, '%' ) ORDER BY r.record_time DESC, r.id DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM record WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT SUM( CASE WHEN record_type = 2 THEN amount ELSE 0 END ) AS income, SUM( CASE WHEN record_type = 1 THEN amount ELSE 0 END ) AS expense, LPAD(MONTH(record_time), 2, '0') AS timeStr FROM record WHERE (user_id = #{userId} OR user_id IN ( SELECT user_id FROM family WHERE group_id = ( SELECT group_id FROM family WHERE user_id = #{userId} ) AND user_id != #{userId} ) ) AND record_time LIKE CONCAT( #{year}, '%' ) GROUP BY MONTH(record_time)

SELECT SUM( CASE WHEN record_type = 2 THEN amount ELSE 0 END ) AS income, SUM( CASE WHEN record_type = 1 THEN amount ELSE 0 END ) AS expense, DATE_FORMAT(record_time,'%Y') timeStr FROM record WHERE (user_id = #{userId} OR user_id IN ( SELECT user_id FROM family WHERE group_id = ( SELECT group_id FROM family WHERE user_id = #{userId} ) AND user_id != #{userId} ) ) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(record_time,'%Y')
